# Copilot Instructions

Read AGENTS.md first.

Treat AGENTS.md as the primary execution guide.
Treat the /docs folder as the project specification.

Never change the project architecture without updating documentation.

Before implementing any feature:
1. Read AGENTS.md
2. Read all docs in /docs folder
3. Compare docs with current code
4. Identify the next milestone
5. Present a short plan
6. Wait for approval

Always keep the code production-ready.
Run type checking and linting after changes.
Never break existing functionality.
If documentation conflicts with code, stop and ask before changing.

Keep commits small and logically separated.
Update documentation if implementation changes it.
